Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Northbound Reroute near Avenue O/126th
ShortDescription: Northbound 30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Avenue O/126th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Avenue O, 126th, Burley, 122nd, Avenue O and over normal route due to street blockage near Avenue O/126th.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
